title: Dakshee

{{Quote|With unrest a constant problem on peripheral Imperial holdings such as Sappire and Dakshee, experts do not expect the Emperor to remain neutral.|A news report by [[Imperial HoloVision]]|<ref name="GNN5" />}}
'''Dakshee''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Barma sector/Legends|Barma sector]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. It was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of its [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. Dakshee was marked by constant unrest under the rule of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Astrography==
{{Quote|Weizel is former Governor of Dakshee in the Colonies, where he came to the attention of the Imperial Court due to his handing of the Brella Temior crisis.|A news report by [[Coruscant Daily Newsfeed/Legends|Coruscant Daily Newsfeed]]|<ref name="GNN7">{{JournalCite|7|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>}}
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Dakshee was located in the [[Barma sector/Legends|Barma sector]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]],<ref name="EAOC" /> within [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was situated near [[Carida/Legends|Carida]] and its [[Sector/Legends|sector]] bordered the [[Haldeen sector/Legends|Haldeen]] and [[Kliap sector/Legends|Kliap sectors]].<ref name="KKT">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/kylekatarnstale|series=Kyle Katarn's Tale|text=Mission 1}}</ref>

The Barma sector also contained the [[AX system]],<ref name="EAOC" /> which comprised the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[AX-456]],<ref name="KKT" /> and the [[Brella Temior system/Legends|Brella Temior system]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==History==
{{Quote|Weizel has a certain flair for handing problem worlds.|[[Amier Candle]], on the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of Dakshee, as reported by [[Coruscant Daily Newsfeed/Legends|Coruscant Daily Newsfeed]]|<ref name="GNN7" />}}
By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], Dakshee had been the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the Barma sector for several [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]].<ref name="KKT" /> The planet remained a long time under the rule of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="CSWE-Dakshee">{{CSWECite|I|162|Dakshee}}</ref> However, Dakshee was marked by constant unrest,<ref name="GNN5" /> to the point that it was considered a problem world for the Empire.<ref name="GNN7" />

At some point, [[Gerald Weizel]] became the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of Dakshee, where he discovered that several [[Union (workers)|union]] heads on the planet were ringleaders of the [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] group [[Justice Action Network]]. Weizel resolved the [[Dakshee affair|affair]] without [[Blood/Legends|bloodshed]].<ref name="GNN7" /> During his tenure as the governor of Dakshee, Weizel also handled the [[Brella Temior crisis]], which brought the ambitious<ref name="SoR">''[[Strongholds of Resistance]]''</ref> governor to the attention of the [[Imperial Court/Legends|Imperial Court]].<ref name="GNN7" /> Governor Weizel's involvement in the Dakshee affair and the Brella Temior crisis gave him a reputation of having a certain flair for handing problem worlds. This reputation eventually led him to be appointed as the new governor of [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].<ref name="GNN7" />

During the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] transmitted [[Propaganda/Legends|propaganda]] broadcasts to the restless population of Dakshee from a secret base in the nearby AX system. Rebel [[operative]]s from Dakshee eventually built a permanent [[Relay station/Legends|relay station]] on the asteroid AX-456.<ref name="KKT" /> The relay station was barely operational when,<ref name="KKT" /> in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> the Empire [[Battle of AX-456|assaulted]] the installation.<ref name="DF:SE">''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''</ref>

At the start of the [[Dentaal Uprising]], in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] news network [[Imperial HoloVision]] reported that [[Politics/Legends|political]] experts were expecting [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to take action against Imperial-held worlds with a constant unrest problem, such as Dakshee and [[Sappire]].<ref name="GNN5" />

Eventually, at some point between 0 ABY<ref name="GNN5" /> and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Dakshee became the site of an [[Dakshee uprising|uprising]].<ref name="HR">''[[Heroes & Rogues]]''</ref> The Empire responded to the uprising by bringing [[Tarkin Doctrine/Legends|terror]] to the world. During the subjugation of Dakshee, the Empire bombarded the planet first, and then went on to conduct mass executions among the civilian population. The classical [[Actor/Legends|actress]] [[Dana Meimonda]] was present on Dakshee when the Empire subjugated her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].<ref name="HR" /> Meimonda and her [[Dana Meimonda's husband|husband]] were among the very few to escape the massacre,<ref name="HR" /> and both fled to [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]],<ref name="CSWE-Meimonda">{{CSWECite|II|303|Meimonda, Dana}}</ref> the capital of the [[Darpa sector/Legends|Darpa sector]] within the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TFOP">''[[The Far Orbit Project]]''</ref>
